---
title: "Guided Tour: Statistical Plot Annotations"
subtitle: "Labels with 'ggplot2', 'ggpp' and 'ggpmisc'"
date: today
date-modified: today
author: Pedro J. Aphalo
author-meta: Pedro J. Aphalo
listing:
  - id: intro-pages
    categories: true
    contents:
      - "pages/ggplot2-introduction.qmd"
      - "pages/ggpmisc-intro.qmd"
      - "galleries/dataviz-intro.qmd"
    sort: false
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1
    fields: [title, subtitle, date-modified, abstract]
    field-display-names:
      date: "Published"
      date-modified: "Edited"
      abstract: "Abstract"
  - id: ggpp-pages
    contents:
      - "galleries/pairwise-labels.qmd"
      - "galleries/nudge-and-repel.qmd"
      - "galleries/plot-insets.qmd"
      - "galleries/bar-col-plots.qmd"
      - "galleries/plot-timeline.qmd"
      - "galleries/plot-interactive.qmd"
    sort: false
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1
    fields: [title, subtitle, date-modified, abstract]
    field-display-names:
      date: "Published"
      date-modified: "Edited"
      abstract: "Abstract"
  - id: ggpmisc-pages
    contents:
      - "galleries/plot-equations.qmd"
      - "galleries/multcomp.qmd"
      - "galleries/quadrant-volcano-plots.qmd"
      - "galleries/ggally-ggpairs.qmd"
      - "galleries/plot-equations-markdown.qmd"
      - "galleries/plot-annimation.qmd"
    sort: false
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1
    fields: [title, subtitle, date-modified, abstract]
    field-display-names:
      date: "Published"
      date-modified: "Edited"
      abstract: "Abstract"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
categories: [ggpp, ggpmisc, R, plotting]
abstract: |
  This page contains an orderly collection of links to code examples making use of R packages 'ggplot2', 'ggpp', 'ggpmisc', 'ggrepel', and other packages, as well as links to the documentation web sites the packages used in the examples.
---

## Anotations and data labels

[Package 'ggplot2' documentation](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/)

::: {#intro-pages}
:::

## 'ggpp'

[Package 'ggpp' documentation](https://docs.r4photobiology.info/ggpp/)

::: {#ggpp-pages}
:::

## 'ggpmisc'

[Package 'ggpmisc' documentation](https://docs.r4photobiology.info/ggpmisc/)

::: {#ggpmisc-pages}
:::
